scripts.check: node --check apps/api/src/server.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/config.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/store.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/gmail.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/classifier.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/demo-data.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/ai/prompts.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/ai/golden-records.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/ai/ollama.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/ai/phoenix.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/ai/pipeline.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/ai/verification.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/ai-run.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/ai-verify.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/demo-reset.mjs && node --check apps/api/src/dev-seed.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke.mjs && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck
scripts.e2e: bun run build && bun run --cwd apps/web playwright test --config ../../playwright.config.ts
scripts.e2e:headed: bun run build && bun run --cwd apps/web playwright test --config ../../playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.verify: bun run check && bun run test && bun run ai:verify && bun run smoke
